'''竏嗄-th-m-k''' ('''kamathmekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wallride|wallride]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wallride|wallride]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗄-th-m-k
|-
! Lemma
| kamathmekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimathmekoko|thimathmekoko]] || [[word:jimathmekoko|jimathmekoko]] || [[word:shimathmekoko|shimathmekoko]] || [[word:kimathmekoko|kimathmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumathmekoko|thuthumathmekoko]] || [[word:jujumathmekoko|jujumathmekoko]] || [[word:shushumathmekoko|shushumathmekoko]] || [[word:kukumathmekoko|kukumathmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumathmekoko|thumathmekoko]] || [[word:jumathmekoko|jumathmekoko]] || [[word:shumathmekoko|shumathmekoko]] || [[word:kumathmekoko|kumathmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumathmekoko|thumathmekoko]] || [[word:jumathmekoko|jumathmekoko]] || [[word:shumathmekoko|shumathmekoko]] || [[word:kumathmekoko|kumathmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themathmekoko|themathmekoko]] || [[word:jemathmekoko|jemathmekoko]] || [[word:shemathmekoko|shemathmekoko]] || [[word:kemathmekoko|kemathmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomathmekoko|thothomathmekoko]] || [[word:jojomathmekoko|jojomathmekoko]] || [[word:shoshomathmekoko|shoshomathmekoko]] || [[word:kokomathmekoko|kokomathmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomathmekoko|thomathmekoko]] || [[word:jomathmekoko|jomathmekoko]] || [[word:shomathmekoko|shomathmekoko]] || [[word:komathmekoko|komathmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomathmekoko|thomathmekoko]] || [[word:jomathmekoko|jomathmekoko]] || [[word:shomathmekoko|shomathmekoko]] || [[word:komathmekoko|komathmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦmathmekoko|thﾃｦmathmekoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦmathmekoko|jﾃｦmathmekoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦmathmekoko|shﾃｦmathmekoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦmathmekoko|kﾃｦmathmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamathmekoko|thathamathmekoko]] || [[word:jajamathmekoko|jajamathmekoko]] || [[word:shashamathmekoko|shashamathmekoko]] || [[word:kakamathmekoko|kakamathmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamathmekoko|thamathmekoko]] || [[word:jamathmekoko|jamathmekoko]] || [[word:shamathmekoko|shamathmekoko]] || [[word:kamathmekoko|kamathmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamathmekoko|thamathmekoko]] || [[word:jamathmekoko|jamathmekoko]] || [[word:shamathmekoko|shamathmekoko]] || [[word:kamathmekoko|kamathmekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamathmekithi|shamathmekithi]] || [[word:shamathmekiji|shamathmekiji]] || [[word:shamathmekishi|shamathmekishi]] || [[word:shamathmekiki|shamathmekiki]]
